key_sentences.english: As urbanisation accelerates, more and more people are flooding into cities, and traffic has become increasingly congested.

key_sentences.pinyin: Yóu yú chéng shì fā zhǎn guò kuài, bù fèn shè qū de gōng gòng shè shī yán zhòng bù zú.
key_sentences.english: Due to the excessively rapid development of cities, public facilities in some communities are seriously inadequate.

key_sentences.chinese: 尽管城市生活节奏很快、压力很大，但便利的设施让很多人不愿离开。
key_sentences.pinyin: Jǐn guǎn chéng shì shēng huó jié zòu hěn kuài, yā lì hěn dà, dàn biàn lì de shè shī ràng hěn duō rén bú yuàn lí kāi.
key_sentences.english: Although the pace of city life is fast and stressful, the convenient facilities make many people reluctant to leave.

key_sentences.chinese: 随着绿化面积不断扩大，城市的生态环境得到了明显改善。
key_sentences.pinyin: Suí zhe lǜ huà miàn jī bú duàn kuò dà, chéng shì de shēng tài huán jìng dé dào le míng xiǎn gǎi shàn.
key_sentences.english: As green spaces continue to expand, the ecological environment of cities has been significantly improved.

key_sentences.chinese: 由于空气污染严重，市政府加大了对绿化的投入。
key_sentences.pinyin: Yóu yú kōng qì wū rǎn yán zhòng, shì zhèng fǔ jiā dà le duì lǜ huà de tóu rù.
key_sentences.english: Due to serious air pollution, the municipal government has increased investment in greening.

key_sentences.chinese: 尽管公共交通系统不断完善，但高峰期的拥挤问题依然难以完全解决。
key_sentences.pinyin: Jǐn guǎn gōng gòng jiāo tōng xì tǒng bú duàn wán shàn, dàn gāo fēng qī de yōng jǐ wèn tí yī rán nán yǐ wán quán jiě jué.
key_sentences.english: Although the public transportation system continues to improve, the problem of congestion during peak hours remains difficult to fully resolve.

key_sentences.chinese: 城市的交通拥挤和污染问题需要通过改善设施来解决。
key_sentences.pinyin: Chéng shì de jiāo tōng yōng jǐ hé wū rǎn wèn tí xū yào tōng guò gǎi shàn shè shī lái jiě jué.
key_sentences.english: The problems of urban traffic congestion and pollution need to be solved by improving facilities.

key_sentences.chinese: 社区绿化可以有效改善城市环境，减少污染带来的压力。
key_sentences.pinyin: Shè qū lǜ huà kě yǐ yǒu xiào gǎi shàn chéng shì huán jìng, jiǎn shǎo wū rǎn dài lái de yā lì.
key_sentences.english: Community greening can effectively improve the urban environment and reduce the pressure caused by pollution.

key_sentences.chinese: 快节奏的城市生活让居民感到便利，但也带来了很多压力。
key_sentences.pinyin: Kuài jié zòu de chéng shì shēng huó ràng jū mín gǎn dào biàn lì, dàn yě dài lái le hěn duō yā lì.
key_sentences.english: The fast-paced urban life makes residents feel convenient, but also brings a lot of pressure.

grammar_points.title: A（Whole）由 B（Parts）组成 — A is composed of B
grammar_points.explanation:
A（Whole）由 B（Parts）组成 describes what something is made up of or composed of. A is the whole entity, B is the list of parts or components.

Structure: A + 由 + B（part 1、part 2…）+ 组成

• 一个宜居的城市由完善的设施、合理的规划和良好的生态环境组成。
  (A liveable city is composed of well-developed facilities, reasonable planning, and a good ecological environment.)
• 城市的公共交通系统由地铁、公共汽车和自行车道等部分组成。
  (The city's public transportation system is composed of the subway, buses, and bicycle lanes.)

Notes:
• 由 here means "made up of / consisting of"
• 组成 means "to form / to make up" — together, 由…组成 = "is composed of"
• B can be a list of nouns or noun phrases separated by 、or 和
• This structure is often used to describe cities, systems, teams, or organisations

examples.chinese: 一个宜居的城市由完善的设施、合理的规划和良好的生态环境组成。
examples.pinyin: yí gè yí jū de chéng shì yóu wán shàn de shè shī hé lǐ de guī huà hé liáng hǎo de shēng tài huán jìng zǔ chéng
examples.english: A liveable city is composed of well-developed facilities, reasonable planning, and a good ecological environment.

examples.chinese: 城市的公共交通系统由地铁、公共汽车和自行车道等部分组成。
examples.pinyin: chéng shì de gōng gòng jiāo tōng xì tǒng yóu dì tiě gōng gòng qì chē hé zì xíng chē dào děng bù fèn zǔ chéng
examples.english: The city's public transportation system is composed of the subway, buses, and bicycle lanes.

examples.chinese: 这个社区由若干居民楼、公共设施和绿化区组成，生活非常便利。
examples.pinyin: zhè ge shè qū yóu ruò gān jū mín lóu gōng gòng shè shī hé lǜ huà qū zǔ chéng shēng huó fēi cháng biàn lì
examples.english: This community is composed of residential buildings, public facilities, and green areas, making life very convenient.

exercises.question: 这个城市的公共交通网络___地铁、公共汽车和出租车等部分___，十分完善。
Which sentence correctly uses A由B组成?
exercises.correct: 一个宜居的社区由完善的设施、绿化和合理的规划组成。
options: 一个宜居的社区由完善的设施、绿化和合理的规划组成。
社区宜居由设施绿化规划组成一个。
由设施完善组成宜居社区一个。
一个社区组成宜居由设施、绿化和规划。
option_pinyin: yí gè yí jū de shè qū yóu wán shàn de shè shī lǜ huà hé hé lǐ de guī huà zǔ chéng

exercises.question: What does A由B组成 express?
exercises.correct: A is composed of / made up of B — B lists the components of A
options: A is composed of / made up of B — B lists the components of A
A changes because of B — B is the cause
A happens after B — B is the sequence
A is compared to B — B is the reference point

mini_exercises.correct: A is made up of / composed of B (A is the whole, B the parts)
options: A is made up of / composed of B (A is the whole, B the parts)

option_pinyin: yí gè yí jū de chéng shì yóu wán shàn de shè shī hé hé lǐ de guī huà zǔ chéng

grammar_points.title: (自)……以来 — Since (a point in time)
grammar_points.explanation:
(自)……以来 marks a starting point in the past and indicates that a situation has continued from that point up to now. 自 (since/from) is optional — 以来 alone can follow a time expression or event clause.

Structures:
• 自 + time/event + 以来, + main clause
• time/event + 以来, + main clause (自 omitted)

• 自城市化进程加快以来，城市对公共交通的需求越来越大。
  (Since the urbanisation process accelerated, the demand for public transportation has been growing.)
• 自政府推进绿化建设以来，城市的生态环境得到了明显改善。
  (Since the government promoted greening construction, the ecological environment has significantly improved.)

Common time markers used:
• 自城市化加速以来 — since urbanisation accelerated
• 近年来 — in recent years (以来 alone, no 自)
• 自从改革开放以来 — since the Reform and Opening Up

The main clause often includes 一直, 已经, 越来越, or 不断 to emphasise continuity.

examples.chinese: 自城市化进程加快以来，城市对公共交通的需求越来越大。
examples.pinyin: zì chéng shì huà jìn chéng jiā kuài yǐ lái chéng shì duì gōng gòng jiāo tōng de xū qiú yuè lái yuè dà
examples.english: Since the urbanisation process accelerated, the demand for public transportation has been growing.

examples.chinese: 自政府推进绿化建设以来，城市的生态环境得到了明显改善。
examples.pinyin: zì zhèng fǔ tuī jìn lǜ huà jiàn shè yǐ lái chéng shì de shēng tài huán jìng dé dào le míng xiǎn gǎi shàn
examples.english: Since the government promoted greening construction, the ecological environment of cities has been significantly improved.

examples.chinese: 自公共设施不断完善以来，这个社区变得越来越宜居。
examples.pinyin: zì gōng gòng shè shī bù duàn wán shàn yǐ lái zhè ge shè qū biàn dé yuè lái yuè yí jū
examples.english: Since public facilities have continued to improve, this community has become more and more liveable.

exercises.question: ___城市化快速发展以来，城市的设施建设越来越完善。
Which sentence correctly uses 自……以来?
exercises.correct: 自绿化计划实施以来，城市的生态环境明显改善了。
options: 自绿化计划实施以来，城市的生态环境明显改善了。
以来自绿化计划实施，城市的生态环境明显改善了。
绿化计划自以来实施，城市生态环境明显改善了。
城市自绿化计划，生态以来实施明显改善了。
option_pinyin: zì lǜ huà jì huà shí shī yǐ lái chéng shì de shēng tài huán jìng míng xiǎn gǎi shàn le

exercises.question: What does 以来 in 自……以来 indicate?
exercises.correct: A starting point in the past — the situation began then and has continued to the present
options: A starting point in the past — the situation began then and has continued to the present
A future goal — what will happen after a condition is met
A contrast — something unexpected given the preceding condition
A cause — the reason why the main clause happened

mini_exercises.question: 自……以来 means...
mini_exercises.correct: Since (a point in the past) — marks the beginning of an ongoing situation that continues to now
options: Since (a point in the past) — marks the beginning of an ongoing situation that continues to now
As long as — introduces a condition

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: Since the public transportation system improved, peak-hour congestion has been alleviated.
mini_exercises.question_chinese: ___公共交通系统完善以来，高峰（期）的拥挤问题有所缓解。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: ___公共交通系统完善以来，高峰（期）的拥挤问题有所缓解。
mini_exercises.question_english: Since the public transportation system improved, peak-hour congestion has been alleviated.

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 自……以来?
mini_exercises.correct: 自城市化加速以来，绿化建设越来越受到重视。
options: 自城市化加速以来，绿化建设越来越受到重视。
城市化加速以来自，绿化建设越来越受到重视。
以来自城市化，绿化建设加速越来越受到重视。
绿化建设自以来城市化加速，越来越受到重视。
option_pinyin: zì chéng shì huà jiā sù yǐ lái lǜ huà jiàn shè yuè lái yuè shòu dào zhòng shì

grammar_points.title: 说不定 — Perhaps; maybe (as a parenthesis / 插入语)
grammar_points.explanation:
说不定 literally means "hard to say / cannot be determined." When used as a parenthesis (插入语), it expresses uncertainty or possibility about a situation, similar to "perhaps", "maybe", or "it could be that".

As a parenthesis, 说不定 can be placed:
• Before the subject: 说不定这个城市以后会变得更宜居。
  (Perhaps this city will become more liveable in the future.)
• After the subject: 这个城市说不定会变得更宜居。
  (This city will perhaps become more liveable.)

Examples with lesson vocabulary:
• 说不定未来的城市会变得更加宜居。
  (Perhaps future cities will become even more liveable.)
• 这个社区的设施还不完善，说不定政府会重新规划这里。
  (The facilities here aren't fully developed; the government will perhaps re-plan this area.)

Notes:
• 说不定 is more colloquial than 也许 or 可能
• It often implies the speaker thinks something is probable or plausible
• Unlike 也许/可能, 说不定 always floats as a sentence-level parenthesis — it cannot modify a single verb alone

examples.chinese: 随着城市化发展，说不定未来的城市会变得更加宜居。
examples.pinyin: suí zhe chéng shì huà fā zhǎn shuō bù dìng wèi lái de chéng shì huì biàn dé gèng jiā yí jū
examples.english: As urbanisation develops, perhaps future cities will become even more liveable.

examples.chinese: 这个社区的设施还不完善，说不定政府会重新规划这里。
examples.pinyin: zhè ge shè qū de shè shī hái bù wán shàn shuō bù dìng zhèng fǔ huì chóng xīn guī huà zhè lǐ
examples.english: The facilities in this community are not yet well-developed; the government will perhaps re-plan this area.

examples.chinese: 说不定这座城市的生态环境以后会越来越好，绿化也会更多。
examples.pinyin: shuō bù dìng zhè zuò chéng shì de shēng tài huán jìng yǐ hòu huì yuè lái yuè hǎo lǜ huà yě huì gèng duō
examples.english: Perhaps the ecological environment of this city will get better and better in the future, with more green spaces too.

exercises.question: What does 说不定 mean in 说不定这个社区以后会变得更加宜居？
exercises.correct: Perhaps; maybe — expressing possibility or uncertainty about the future
options: Perhaps; maybe — expressing possibility or uncertainty about the future

exercises.question: 随着城市化发展，___未来的高峰（期）拥挤问题会得到解决。
Which sentence uses 说不定 correctly as a parenthesis (插入语)?
exercises.correct: 这里的生态环境不错，说不定以后会成为最宜居的社区。
options: 这里的生态环境不错，说不定以后会成为最宜居的社区。
说不定生态，这里是环境不错宜居社区。
以后宜居社区会成为说不定，这里生态不错。
说不定宜居，这里的生态环境不错以后会成为。
option_pinyin: zhè lǐ de shēng tài huán jìng bù cuò shuō bù dìng yǐ hòu huì chéng wéi zuì yí jū de shè qū

mini_exercises.question: 说不定 as a parenthesis (插入语) expresses...
mini_exercises.correct: Uncertainty or possibility — "perhaps; maybe; it could be that..."
options: Uncertainty or possibility — "perhaps; maybe; it could be that..."
Strong certainty — "definitely; certainly; without a doubt"
Cause — "because; due to; as a result of"

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: As green spaces increase, perhaps the ecological environment of this city will get better and better.
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 随着绿化增加，___这座城市的生态会越来越好。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 随着绿化增加，___这座城市的生态会越来越好。
mini_exercises.question_english: As green spaces increase, perhaps the ecological environment of this city will get better and better.

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 说不定 as a parenthesis?
mini_exercises.correct: 随着绿化不断增加，说不定这个社区的生态环境会越来越宜居。
options: 随着绿化不断增加，说不定这个社区的生态环境会越来越宜居。
绿化增加随着，这个社区说不定生态宜居。
这个社区说不定，绿化生态环境宜居不断增加。
说不定，绿化增加这个宜居社区的生态。
option_pinyin: suí zhe lǜ huà bù duàn zēng jiā shuō bù dìng zhè ge shè qū de shēng tài huán jìng huì yuè lái yuè yí jū

culture_notes.title: China's Rapid Urbanisation and Smart City Development
culture_notes.title_chinese: 中国城镇化与智慧城市建设
culture_notes.content: China has undergone one of the fastest urbanisation processes in human history. In 1980, less than 20% of China's population lived in cities; by 2023, that figure had risen to over 65%. This dramatic shift has created enormous demand for urban infrastructure (设施, shè shī), public transportation (公共交通, gōng gòng jiāo tōng), housing, and green spaces (绿化, lǜ huà). Chinese cities have responded with ambitious urban planning (城市规划, chéng shì guī huà) initiatives. Beijing, Shanghai, and Shenzhen are among the world's leading 'smart cities', using big data, artificial intelligence, and sensors to manage traffic, reduce pollution (污染, wū rǎn), and improve residents' daily lives. Despite these advances, challenges remain: the fast pace of life (生活节奏, shēng huó jié zòu), traffic congestion, housing pressure, and air quality continue to concern city dwellers. In response, China is expanding metro networks, investing in electric vehicles, and creating large urban parks to improve the quality of life in its booming cities.

idioms.english: To advance with the times; to keep pace with modern developments

quiz.question: What does 交通 mean?
Which word means 'crowded; congested'?
What does 污染 mean?
Which word means 'community; neighbourhood'?
What does 绿化 mean?
Which word means 'planning; urban planning; to plan'?
What does the phrase 生活节奏 mean?
Fill in the blank: _____ 城市人口增加，公共交通需求也越来越大。
What does 随着 mean?
quiz.correct: As; along with; following a change
options: As; along with; following a change

quiz.question: Fill in the blank: _____ 空气污染严重，市政府加大了绿化投入。
Which sentence uses 由于 correctly?
quiz.correct: 由于天气原因，运动会被取消了。
options: 由于天气原因，运动会被取消了。
天气原因由于，运动会被取消了。
运动会由于被取消了，天气原因。
由于运动会被取消，了天气原因。

quiz.question: Choose the correct sentence using 尽管.
quiz.correct: 尽管城市节奏很快，很多人还是喜欢城市生活。
options: 尽管城市节奏很快，很多人还是喜欢城市生活。
由于城市节奏尽管很快，很多人还是喜欢城市生活。
城市节奏尽管很快，城市生活很多人还是喜欢。
很多人尽管城市节奏很快，还是喜欢城市生活。

quiz.question: What does 便利 mean?
What does 压力 mean?
What does the phrase 城市规划 mean?
Which word means 'facilities; infrastructure'?
What does the phrase 缓解压力 mean?
According to the culture note, what percentage of China's population lived in cities by 2023?
What does the phrase 空气污染 mean?
What does the idiom 与时俱进 mean?
quiz.correct: To advance with the times; to keep pace with modern developments
options: To advance with the times; to keep pace with modern developments
To live a slower, healthier life

quiz.question: What does '交通拥挤' mean?
What does '城市污染' mean?
Fill in: 社区绿化可以有效 _____ 城市环境，减少污染带来的压力。

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 兰特，你住在城市这么多年，觉得城市生活怎么样？
lines.pinyin: Lán Tè, nǐ zhù zài chéng shì zhè me duō nián, jué de chéng shì shēng huó zěn me yàng?
lines.english: Elena, you've been living in the city for so many years. How do you find city life?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 随着城市不断发展，生活确实越来越便利了，公共交通和各种设施都很完善。
lines.pinyin: Suí zhe chéng shì bú duàn fā zhǎn, shēng huó què shí yuè lái yuè biàn lì le, gōng gòng jiāo tōng hé gè zhǒng shè shī dōu hěn wán shàn.
lines.english: As the city continues to develop, life has indeed become more and more convenient. Public transportation and all kinds of facilities are very well developed.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 但是城市的交通那么拥挤，压力也很大，你不觉得很累吗？
lines.pinyin: Dàn shì chéng shì de jiāo tōng nà me yōng jǐ, yā lì yě hěn dà, nǐ bù jué de hěn lèi ma?
lines.english: But the city traffic is so congested and there's so much pressure. Don't you feel very tired?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 尽管生活节奏很快，压力不小，但城市的工作机会多，我还是很喜欢这里。
lines.pinyin: Jǐn guǎn shēng huó jié zòu hěn kuài, yā lì bù xiǎo, dàn chéng shì de gōng zuò jī huì duō, wǒ hái shì hěn xǐ huān zhè lǐ.
lines.english: Although the pace of life is fast and there is considerable pressure, the city has many job opportunities, and I still like it here very much.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 由于空气污染严重，我总是觉得城市的环境比郊区差多了。
lines.pinyin: Yóu yú kōng qì wū rǎn yǎn zhòng, wǒ zǒng shì jué de chéng shì de huán jìng bǐ jiāo qū chà duō le.
lines.english: Due to air pollution, I always feel that the city environment is much worse than the suburb.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 但随着政府加大绿化投入，空气质量在慢慢改善，很多社区现在都有漂亮的公园。
lines.pinyin: Dàn suí zhe zhèng fǔ jiā dà lǜ huà tóu rù, kōng qì zhì liàng zài màn màn gǎi shàn, hěn duō shè qū xiàn zài dōu yǒu piào liang de gōng yuán.
lines.english: But as the government increases investment in greening, air quality is slowly improving, and many communities now have beautiful parks.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 那很好！尽管城市有不少问题，但只要规划合理，城市生活是可以越来越好的！
lines.pinyin: Nà hěn hǎo! Jǐn guǎn chéng shì yǒu bù shǎo wèn tí, dàn zhǐ yào guī huà hé lǐ, chéng shì shēng huó shì kě yǐ yuè lái yuè hǎo de!
lines.english: That's great! Although cities have quite a few problems, as long as planning is reasonable, city life can keep getting better!

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 陈教授，随着中国城市化进程加快，城市面临哪些主要挑战？
lines.pinyin: Chén jiào shòu, suí zhe Zhōng guó chéng shì huà jìn chéng jiā kuài, chéng shì miàn lín nǎ xiē zhǔ yào tiǎo zhàn?
lines.english: Professor Chen, as China's urbanisation process accelerates, what are the main challenges cities face?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 主要挑战有三个：交通拥挤、环境污染和公共设施不足。
lines.pinyin: Zhǔ yào tiǎo zhàn yǒu sān gè: jiāo tōng yōng jǐ, huán jìng wū rǎn hé gōng gòng shè shī bù zú.
lines.english: There are three main challenges: traffic congestion, environmental pollution, and insufficient public facilities.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 由于人口大量涌入城市，这些问题会越来越严重吗？
lines.pinyin: Yóu yú rén kǒu dà liàng yǒng rù chéng shì, zhè xiē wèn tí huì yuè lái yuè yán zhòng ma?
lines.english: Due to the massive influx of people into cities, will these problems become increasingly serious?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 不一定。随着科技发展，智慧城市建设可以大大缓解这些压力。
lines.pinyin: Bù yí dìng. Suí zhe kē jì fā zhǎn, zhì huì chéng shì jiàn shè kě yǐ dà dà huǎn jiě zhè xiē yā lì.
lines.english: Not necessarily. As technology develops, smart city construction can greatly relieve these pressures.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 尽管智慧城市概念很好，但很多老旧社区的设施还是难以改善，怎么办？
lines.pinyin: Jǐn guǎn zhì huì chéng shì gài niàn hěn hǎo, dàn hěn duō lǎo jiù shè qū de shè shī hái shì nán yǐ gǎi shàn, zěn me bàn?
lines.english: Although the smart city concept is good, many old communities still find it hard to improve their facilities. What can be done?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这就需要合理的城市规划。由于历史遗留问题，改造需要时间，但政府正在逐步推进绿化和设施更新。
lines.pinyin: Zhè jiù xū yào hé lǐ de chéng shì guī huà. Yóu yú lì shǐ yí liú wèn tí, gǎi zào xū yào shí jiān, dàn zhèng fǔ zhèng zài zhú bù tuī jìn lǜ huà hé shè shī gēng xīn.
lines.english: This requires reasonable urban planning. Due to historical legacy issues, renovation takes time, but the government is gradually advancing greening and facility upgrades.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 谢谢您的分析！希望中国的城市能与时俱进，越来越宜居！
lines.pinyin: Xiè xie nín de fēn xī! Xī wàng Zhōng guó de chéng shì néng yǔ shí jù jìn, yuè lái yuè yí jū!
lines.english: Thank you for your analysis! I hope China's cities can advance with the times and become more and more liveable!
